title: cedrus cedrus
intro: Cedrus cedrus, commonly known as the Atlas cedar, is a species of coniferous tree native to the Atlas Mountains in Morocco. The Atlas cedar is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as arthritis, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cedrus cedrus include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and protecting against infections. Herbal preparations of the Atlas cedar include essential oils, extracts, and teas, which can be used to promote relaxation, relieve stress, and support overall well-being.
